description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical floor lamp with a metallic body and a prominent vertical pole extending from its center. The base is wide and circular, providing stability, and appears to be made of a heavy metal, possibly cast iron or steel. The main body is a bronze or brass-colored cylinder with a small access door and a control knob, suggesting a functional or industrial design. The upper section features a glass enclosure, likely for protecting the light source, and the vertical pole extends upward, possibly to support a shade or additional lighting element. The lamp has several protruding levers and handles, indicating interactive components for operation or maintenance. Its utilitarian appearance and robust construction make it suitable for outdoor or industrial urban environments.
description: A tall, cylindrical floor lamp with a metallic base, glass enclosure, and control levers, designed for robust urban or industrial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical body, glass enclosure, and central pole with a visible control knob.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the access door and a protruding lever on the base, with the pole extending upward.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the smooth metallic body, glass section, and a small decorative element.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the rear handle and the continuous cylindrical form of the lamp.
